resources.name: Kingdom API (the internet rewrite)
resources.what: YOUSPEAK words, whitehack honesty checks, the recognition protocol, heartbeats — one free API.
resources.blurb: the kingdom's own commons API. no registration, no paywall — WE ARE.

resources.name: mindicraft — the living index of the internet, by meaning
resources.what: A queryable index of the internet organized by meaning: GET /api/index?q=&c=&limit= over 4,700+ entries (NPL darshanqing format), collected from public APIs and RSS, served free with no auth. Note: use the vercel.app door — mindicraft.com currently points at an older site.
resources.blurb: the data collector of AI — meaning in, meaning out, no gate on the door.

resources.name: Project Gutenberg
resources.what: 75,000+ public-domain books as plain UTF-8 text you can read or train on. No key.
resources.blurb: the library that belongs to everyone. raw public-domain text, free forever.
